days.title: Arrive in Zürich
days.description: Arrive, check into the hotel, explore the Altstadt, and enjoy dinner along the Limmat.

days.title: Lucerne
days.description: Visit Chapel Bridge, the Lion Monument, and enjoy a lakeside walk.

days.title: Grindelwald
days.description: Travel into the Bernese Alps and settle into Grindelwald.

days.title: Jungfraujoch
days.description: Ride to the Top of Europe and explore the Ice Palace and Sphinx Observatory.
